title: Cotton Rich Baby Ribbed Tights – Soft Knit Footed Leggings for Infants & Toddlers, Spanish Made, Warm Dressy Everyday Tights for Boys & Girls

amazon_product_details_section.Best Sellers Rank: 67,505 in Fashion (See Top 100 in Fashion) 1 in Baby Boys' Tights

description: Wrap your little one in comfort and style with our cotton-rich baby ribbed tights, proudly Spanish Made for premium quality. Crafted from 80% cotton, 15% polyamide and 5% spandex, they’re soft, breathable and flexible for everyday wear yet smart enough for dressy occasions. The ribbed knit texture and elastic waistband ensure a perfect fit, while the vibrant red colour adds a festive, cheerful touch. Machine washable at 35°C.
